scope: Generate a repo-local watchtower snapshot that includes the new MiroFish Portfolio dashboard surface

decision_context.prior_state: The watchtower code could now render the canonical MiroFish checkpoint, but the repo did not yet contain a generated observatory snapshot under mutable targets.
decision_context.decision: Run the existing watchtower command with a research/meta vault directory so the generated observatory pages are saved inside the allowed workspace scope.
decision_context.why_now: This turns the new watchtower surface from code-only support into a concrete downstream artifact for review.

files_expected.purpose: Generated trend predictions page with links into the MiroFish portfolio surface.

planned_steps: Run the watchtower CLI with a vault directory inside research/meta
Save the generated page list to a result packet
Inspect the generated MiroFish Portfolio page to confirm it resolves to the canonical medium checkpoint export

expected_checks: The generated page list includes MiroFish Portfolio.md
The generated MiroFish Portfolio page points at the canonical medium export artifact
All generated pages are written under research/meta/watchtower_2026-03-24

guardrails: Do not write the watchtower snapshot outside research/meta
Treat the generated pages as a surface over the canonical checkpoint, not as a new scoring source
